parents.subject: LU-10070 lod: SEL: Implement basic spillover space

commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: testing SEL patch
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: testing SEL patch

The SEL patch https://review.whamcloud.com/33783/
seems to hit LU-8622 at a higher rate than any other
patches. Let's see if that's true ... again.
